name: reishi mushroom
interactions: May potentiate stimulant effects when combined with sympathomimetic agents.
safetyNotes: Moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. Avoid combining with other stimulants.

description: Reishi mushroom is a medicinal herb traditionally used for daily adaptogen-style mushroom routines and evening-friendly non-stimulant wellness support.
dosage: Use products with clear fruiting-body and extract details; dose comparisons should stay within similar extract types.
duration: Usually framed as a consistency herb used over weeks rather than immediate-effect expectations.
preparation: Capsules and extracts are common for consistency; tea supports lower-intensity ritual use.
